svg.style: background: #ffffff; background-color: var(--ge-adaptive-bg, #ffffff); color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron" scale="1" border="0"> <diagram id="-rJkHaZjY3P4LMEys8rY" name="Page-1"> <mxGraphModel dx="1665" dy="888" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1169" pageHeight="827" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <UserObject label="" mermaidData="{
 "data": "flowchart LR
 Client[\"Client / Frontend\"]

 subgraph VM[\"Oracle Cloud VM (Ubuntu)\"]
 direction TB
 nginx[\"nginx<br/>Reverse Proxy\"]
 subgraph Replicas[\"3x Stateless API Replicas\"]
 direction LR
 API1[\"API 1\"]
 API2[\"API 2\"]
 API3[\"API 3\"]
 end
 Worker[\"Notification Worker\"]
 nginx --> API1
 nginx --> API2
 nginx --> API3
 end

 Redis[(\"Redis Cloud<br/>Rate limiting & cache\")]
 Mongo[(\"MongoDB Atlas\")]
 Rabbit[(\"CloudAMQP<br/>RabbitMQ\")]

 subgraph Providers[\"Notification Providers\"]
 direction TB
 Resend[\"Resend\"]
 Twilio[\"Twilio\"]
 Firebase[\"Firebase FCM\"]
 end

 Client --> nginx

 API1 --> Redis
 API2 --> Redis
 API3 --> Redis

 API1 --> Mongo
 API2 --> Mongo
 API3 --> Mongo

 API1 --> Rabbit
 API2 --> Rabbit
 API3 --> Rabbit

 Rabbit --> Worker
 Worker --> Mongo
 Worker --> Resend
 Worker --> Twilio
 Worker --> Firebase
",
 "config": null
